data.biography: Amber Rose Tamblyn ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin, Autorin und Regisseurin. Sie erlangte erstmals nationale Bekanntheit durch ihre Rolle als Emily Quartermaine in der Seifenoper General Hospital, gefolgt von einer Hauptrolle in der Primetime-Serie Joan of Arcadia, in der sie die Titelfigur Joan Girardi spielte und für die sie Nominierungen für den Primetime Emmy und den Golden Globe erhielt. data.biography:
Zachary George Roerig, 22 Şubat 1985'te Montpelier, Ohio'da dünyaya geldi. Babası ve dedesinin mezar taşı yapımıyla uğraştığı bir ailede büyüyen Roerig, gençliğinde sporla, özellikle futbol ve güreşle ilgilendi. Oyunculuk tutkusunu keşfettikten sonra kariyerini bu yönde ilerletmek için New York'a taşındı.

Oyunculuk kariyerine New York'ta başladı ve ilk büyük çıkışını "As the World Turns" adlı pembe dizide 2005'ten 2007'ye kadar canlandırdığı Casey Hughes karakteriyle yaptı. Bu rol, ona televizyon dünyasında bir temel oluşturdu. Ardından, eleştirmenlerce beğenilen "Friday Night Lights" dizisinde Cash karakteriyle tekrar eden bir rolde yer alarak dikkat çekti.

Ancak Roerig'in dünya çapında tanınmasını sağlayan ve kariyerinin en ikonik rolü, şüphesiz "The Vampire Diaries" (2009–2017) dizisindeki Matt Donovan karakteridir. Dizinin başından sonuna kadar yer alan Roerig, vampirler, kurt adamlar ve cadılarla dolu bir dünyada hayatta kalmaya çalışan ve ahlaki bir pusula görevi gören ana insan karakteri başarıyla canlandırdı. Matt Donovan, sadakati ve dayanıklılığı ile izleyicilerin en sevdiği karakterlerden biri haline geldi. Roerig, karakterine olan bağlılığını, dizinin spin-off'ları olan "The Originals" ve "Legacies"te de Mystic Falls şerifi olarak rol alarak gösterdi ve karakterin mirasını on yıl boyunca sürdürdü.

"The Vampire Diaries" sona erdikten sonra Roerig, farklı projelerle kariyerine devam etti. USA Network'ün eleştirmenlerce beğenilen gerilim dizisi "Dare Me"de (2019-2020) Çavuş Will Mosley rolüyle başrolde yer aldı. Ayrıca, "The Gifted" ve "Step Up: High Water" gibi dizilerde de rol alarak televizyondaki çalışmalarına devam etti.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Birol Ünel (born 18 August 1961) was a Turkish-German actor who played in German and Turkish films, television, and theatrical productions. His name, "Birol", means "unique" in Turkish.

Ünel was born in Mersin in southern Turkey. In 1968, his family moved to Brinkum near Bremen in Germany. He studied acting at Hanover Conservatory.

Ünel began as a theatre actor at the Berliner Tacheles where he played the lead and also directed the play "Caligula". Ünel made his film debut in 1988's The Passenger. He played a private detective in the film Dealer which he followed up with a role in Fatih Akın's Im Juli. Birol then acted in the award winning Gegen die Wand as Cahit Tomruk. He won the German film prize for best actor for this role.

His latest films have been Transylvania, Seven Heroes and Soul Kitchen. Ünel also acted in the hit Turkish film Hırsız var! in 2005.

data.biography:
Rosa Blasi (born December 19, 1972) is an American actress. She is known for her roles as Luisa Delgado in the Lifetime medical drama series Strong Medicine (2000–2006), and as Barb Thunderman on the Nickelodeon series The Thundermans (2013–2018).

Early life

On Dec 19, 1972, Blasi was born in Chicago, Illinois.[1] Blasi's parents are Rocco and Joyce Blasi, of Italian, Irish and Hispanic origin.[2]

Blasi is classically trained as a mezzo soprano.[3] She also comes from a strong theatre background; ranging from the esteemed Piven Performance Company, as well as The Second City, to starring in numerous musicals and touring with Kenny Rogers. Rosa Blasi has two sisters (Marina) and (Tasha), and two brothers (Michael) and (Rocky).[3]

Career

Blasi's television debut was a recurring role on the CBS soap opera, The Bold and the Beautiful.[3] Soon to follow was a starring role on the MTV/UPN sitcom Hitz. She soon found herself guest starring on numerous shows such as Frasier, Becker, Caroline in the City, V.I.P., Grown Ups, and Beverly Hills, 90210. She later starred in the dramatic Showtime film, Noriega: God's Favorite. The film was directed by Roger Spottiswoode and co-starred Bob Hoskins.

In her breakout role, Blasi starred in the Lifetime drama series Strong Medicine from 2000 to 2006, starring as a doctor who runs a free health clinic. She made an appearance in "Shootout", a 2005 episode of CSI: Miami. Audiences saw Blasi in her first role in a major film as the wife of Bill Pullman's character in The Grudge.

Blasi appeared during The Vagina Monologues at the Apollo Theater and has also been a recurring performer at the "What a Pair" benefit concert for breast cancer research and has recorded numerous radio and television voice-overs. She was a repeat guest on talk shows such as Politically Incorrect with Bill Maher and The Late Late Show with Craig Kilborn. She also played Ronnie Cruz on Make It or Break It.[4] She currently plays Barb Thunderman on Nickelodeon's The Thundermans, as well as a recurring character on General Hospital. She wrote a comedic memoir titled Jock Itch: Misadventures of a Retired Jersey Chaser (2011) published by HarperCollins.

Personal life

Blasi married New York Giants fullback Jim Finn on February 14, 2004. Blasi gave birth to her first child, a daughter Kaia Finn, on September 20, 2006. The couple divorced in 2008.

On May 3, 2014, Blasi married Todd William Harris, a mortgage broker. They married 16 months after they first connected on Match.com. She has a stepdaughter Ryan (from Harris's previous relationship)
data.name: Rosa Blasi

周华健（1960年12月22日－，英文名：Emil Wakin Chau），台湾著名创作歌手、音乐人。祖籍广东汕头市潮南区，出生于香港西营盘。1979年赴台湾求学，1986年加盟滚石唱片公司，逐渐成长为台湾及亚洲华语流行乐坛的天王巨星，至今已发行音乐专辑逾40张，累计销量过数千万。出道初期，周华健因其阳光、健康、积极向上的形象及曲风，被称作“阳光游子”；后因其实力的唱功和天王般的人气而获得“国民歌王”、“天王杀手”之美誉，是20世纪90年代最具影响力的华人歌手之一。

　　华语乐坛英文唱片销量冠军

　　华语乐坛平均单张唱片销量冠军

　　华语乐坛个人演唱会举办次数最高记录保持者

　　华语乐坛个人演唱会演唱时间最长记录保持者

　　华语乐坛歌曲传唱度最高纪录保持者

　　个人专辑最高销量： 《花·心》（1993年IFPI全球华语唱片年度销量冠军；亚洲区销量超过400万张）

　　个人专辑最高地区销量：《爱相随》（台湾地区年度销量超过100万张） 　　最高英文唱片销量：《I Remember》（仅台湾地区年度销量就突破50万张）

　　最高粤语专辑销量：《弦途有你》（香港地区年度销量25万张，亚洲区年度突破百万销量）

　　专辑总销量：截止到2003年底全亚洲超过3500万张 ，唱片销量位居华人歌手第三名

　　演唱会举办次数：截止到2009年底，举办大型个人演唱会近300场，各大校园演唱会约500场；乐队纵贯线Super Band世界巡回演唱会60余场。

data.biography:
Yukie Nakama (born October 30, 1979) is a Japanese actress, singer and former idol. She was born in Okinawa, Japan, in a fisherman's family, the youngest of five siblings. At the start of her career she was a gravure idol and singer (her debut single "Moonlight to Daybreak" was released in 1996), and appeared in bit roles until her career breakthrough playing Sadako in "Ring 0: Birthday (2000)."

In 2000, Nakama demonstrated her talent for comedy with her lead role in the Japanese television drama Trick which proved so popular that it had two more seasons and three film versions, but it was the top-rating TV series Gokusen (2002), a live-action version of the popular manga, that established her as one of Japan's most popular and bankable actresses.

Nakama has featured in commercials for companies such as Nissin, Glico, Lotte, Asahi, Shiseido, au by KDDI, and has even served as a spokesperson for Japan Railways and the Japanese Tax Agency. She is managed by Production Ogi.
data.name: Yukie Nakama

data.biography:
Yukie Nakama (nascida em 30 de outubro de 1979) é uma atriz, cantora e ex-ídolo japonesa. Ela nasceu em Okinawa, Japão, em uma família de pescadores, a caçula de cinco irmãos. No início de sua carreira, ela era uma cantora e idol de gravura (seu single de estreia "Moonlight to Daybreak" foi lançado em 1996), e apareceu em pequenos papéis até sua carreira interpretando Sadako em "Ring 0: Birthday (2000)".

Em 2000, Nakama demonstrou seu talento para a comédia com seu papel principal no drama de televisão japonês Trick, que se mostrou tão popular que teve mais duas temporadas e três versões cinematográficas, mas foi a série de TV Gokusen (2002), uma série ao vivo. -versão de ação do popular mangá, que a estabeleceu como uma das atrizes mais populares e lucrativas do Japão.

Nakama apareceu em comerciais para empresas como Nissin, Glico, Lotte, Asahi, Shiseido, au by KDDI e até atuou como porta-voz da Japan Railways e da Japanese Tax Agency. Ela é gerenciada pela Produção Ogi.

仲间由纪惠（日语：仲間 由紀恵／なかま ゆきえ Nakama Yukie，1979年10月30日—），日本女演员、主持人、歌手、艺人。出身于冲绳县浦添市。Production尾木所属。丈夫是演员田中哲司。昵称“仲間ちゃん”。身高160cm。A型血。

1994年，在冲绳电视广播《青之夏》的普通公开招募试听中获得最高奖。1995年，凭借电视剧《给在日本母亲的一封短信2》进入演艺圈。1996年6月，发表单曲《Moonlight to daybreak》。1998年，出演爱情剧《神啊，请给我多一点时间》。1999年，主演了电视剧《重返少年时》。2000年，首次主演了恐怖电影《午夜凶铃3：贞相大白》。2001年，主演爱情剧《双面情人》。2002年，凭借热血励志校园剧《极道鲜师》获得了第33届日剧学院赏最佳女主角奖。2003年，主演悬疑推理剧《颜》。2005年，主演热血励志校园剧《极道鲜师2》，凭借该剧获得第44届日剧学院赏最佳女主角奖。2006年，主演古装电影《大奥》。2007年，主持关注环境的节目《仲间由纪惠的蓝色地球》。2008年，因主演热血励志校园剧《极道鲜师3》而获得了第57届日剧学院赏最佳女主角奖。2009年，主演喜剧电影《极道鲜师电影版》。2010年，主演了剧情片《武士的家用帐》。2011年，主演医疗剧《恶女们的手术刀》。2012年，主演爱情剧《恋爱啃老族～忘记爱情开始的方法》。2014年，出演古装剧《花子与安妮》，由此获得第82届日剧学院赏最佳女配角奖。2015年，主演舞台剧《放浪记》。2016年，主持的音乐节目《Music Fair》。2017年，主演悬疑剧《乐园》。2019年，出演爱情剧《伪装不伦》。2021年，主演单集剧《女王的法医学～尸活师～》。
data.name: 仲间由纪惠

data.biography:
（仲間由紀惠，1979 年 10 月 30 日-），日本女演員、歌手、前偶像。她出生在日本沖繩的一個漁民家庭，是五個兄弟姐妹中最小的一個。在她職業生涯的初期，她是一位凹版偶像和歌手（她的首張單曲“Moonlight to Daybreak”於 1996 年發行），並出現在一些角色中，直到她在“Ring 0： Birthday （2000）”中扮演貞子的職業生涯突破。

2000 年，中間在日本電視劇《詭計》中擔任主角，展示了她的喜劇天賦，該劇非常受歡迎，以至於它又有兩季和三部電影版本，但收視率最高的電視劇《悟空戰》（2002 年）是流行漫畫的真人版，使她成為日本最受歡迎和最賺錢的女演員之一。

Nakama 曾為日清、格力高、樂天、朝日、資生堂、KDDI 的 au 等公司拍攝廣告，甚至還擔任過日本鐵路和日本税務廳的發言人。她由 Production Ogi 管理。
data.name: 仲間由紀惠

data.biography: Ruth Lawrence is a filmmaker based in St. John’s, NL. Ruth’s feature films include Little Orphans (Best Canadian Feature, Whistler Film Festival 2020), Hopeless Romantic (2018), and the comedy feature, Party Pirate, sold-out its opening Gala overnight at the St. John’s International Women’s Film Festival in October 2023. Her documentaries A Lot of Love in the Room (2021) and Circus by Komatik (2019) have been featured on CBC Gem. She has directed, written, and/or produced on over 70 short films and webisodes. She’s writing two features, one with Sherry White and one with Emily Bridger.  Ruth’s honours include the Joan Orenstein Best Actress Award, the RBC Michelle Jackson Award for Emerging Filmmaker, the Newfoundland and Labrador Arts Council’s Artist of the Year, the Queen’s Jubilee Medal, the YWCA Woman of Distinction, a WIFT-AT WAVE Award, the national Leslie Yeo Award for Volunteerism, and the inaugural Ross Leslie Award for her contributions to film and theatre.
data.name: Ruth Lawrence

data.biography: Angie Cheung Wai-Yee is a Hong Kong-based Malaysian Chinese actress. She won the Miss Chinese Malaysia in 1992 and went to Hong Kong to compete for the Miss Chinese International in 1993. After that, she signed a contract with the Hong Kong television TVB and became an actress.
data.name: Angie Cheung Wai-Yee

data.biography:
张慧仪（Angie Cheung），1970年11月4日出生于马来西亚怡保，马来西亚华裔女演员。

1992年参选马来西亚怡保华埠小姐得到冠军。1993年晋级国际华裔小姐头15名，赛后签约香港电视广播有限公司，并出演首部电视剧兼处境喜剧《开心华之里》。1995年加入温馨处境喜剧《真情》剧组，凭借该剧，她在香港地区走红。

2006年，张慧仪淡出演艺圈，改行从商，经营起家族性的食品生意。2007年在北京通过一慈善组织收养了曾被遗弃街头的Hanson，在广州番禺与领养的儿子相依为命。2009年宣告复出，拍摄香港电台单元剧《论尽一家人之未完的歌》 [2]  以及中国内地励志爱情电视剧《爱情完了吗》。

2014年，张慧仪参演的TVB电视剧《女人俱乐部》于4月21日首播。
data.name: 张慧仪

data.biography: Trương Tuệ Nghi là một nữ diễn viên người Hoa gốc Malaysia trong một gia đình kinh doanh trái cây. Cô đã giành chiến thắng Hoa hậu Trung Quốc Malaysia năm 1992 và đến Hồng Kông để dự thi Hoa hậu Quốc tế Trung Quốc năm 1993. Sau đó, cô ký hợp đồng với TVB truyền hình Hồng Kông và trở thành một nữ diễn viên.
data.name: Trương Tuệ Nghi

data.biography:
張慧儀，馬來西亞華人，香港女演員，曾是無綫電視及亞洲電視合約藝員，目前定居於馬來西亞，偶爾參與客串演出香港或馬來西亞電影和電視劇等等；她亦是 1992 年馬來西亞怡保區華裔小姐冠軍。

1993 年，張慧儀決定到香港發展，並代表馬來西亞怡保參選國際華裔小姐打入最後十二強，惜最終未能奪冠，但獲得無綫電視賞識，並與之簽約，成為旗下藝員。1993 年，首次演出電視劇《開心華之裏》，在劇中所佔之戲份甚重，也是該劇的核心女配角之一。其後曾在《廉政行動 1994》、《新重案傳真》中都以女配角身份出場。1994 年，在《包青天之泣血鳳凰》中所飾演的皇后一角，嶄露頭角，演技獲得關注。

1995 年，張慧儀正式加入温馨情境喜劇《真情》劇組，與李司棋、關海山、劉丹、郭少藝等人合演。在劇中分別飾演劉丹的妹妹李彩瑤及容向海（黃智賢飾演）的歡喜冤家吳芳貴一角，於第 276 集彩瑤慘死一幕中，收視率急速標高因而創下情境喜劇高收視率的記錄，並與其後於第 666 集，歸亞美（馬蹄露 飾演）跳樓一幕的收視平等。觀看該劇的觀眾都為之感動，議論紛紛。1998 年，更獲香港電台頒發「優質演藝女演員」。在拍攝《真情》期間，她渴望擔任女主角，為了找尋機會而接拍了王晶的電影《強姦 3OL 誘惑》及《原始武器》；因而獲得「性感女神」的稱號.

其後，張慧儀在《有肥人終成眷屬》所飾演的葉開枝及在《西遊記》、《西遊記 (貳)》所飾演的大蜘蛛精詩詩、萬妖女王，大獲好評、演技備受肯定，在古裝劇中都以單元角色身份出場，包括《聊齋 (貳)》及《西遊記 (貳)》。1999 年，她短暫離開無綫電視，並轉投亞洲電視演出《我和殭屍有個約會 II》及《影城大亨》。當中《我和殭屍有個約會 II》，她飾演的馬叮噹一角受不少觀眾喜愛。

2003 年，張慧儀與其未婚夫因感情問題大打出手後，情緖低落兼有輕生念頭的她宣佈退出娛樂圈，結束與無綫電視多年來的賓主關係，離開傷心地轉往馬來西亞發展，之後再轉至中國大陸發展健康食品生意。並因此在福利院遇見她的養子，更收養了他。

2009 年，張慧儀宣告復出，拍攝香港電台單元劇《論盡一家人》及在中國大陸愛情勵志電視劇《愛情完了嗎》中客串主演朱漫莉一角。2013 年 6 月 20 日，她暫時擱下內地的生意，抽出時間返港參演好友曾志偉監製的時裝勵志電視劇《女人俱樂部》，並在劇中擔任七大女主角之一，此劇並於 2014 年 4 月 21 日首播，2014 年 6 月 1 日大結局播畢。張慧儀在《女人俱樂部》飾演許珍妮，與陸永權大玩姊弟戀，令觀眾留下深刻印象。2013 年，她跟港台電視 31 合拍了《獅子山下 2014》裏的單元劇《夜同行》。並於 2014 年 6 月 15 日及 22 日播出，其合作演員包括有艾威、歐錦棠等。

張慧儀目前已搬回香港。她表示會繼續發展飲食生意及演出電視劇或電影，現無合約在身，亦不排除再與無綫電視合作。在《子程扮熟》的電台節目中，張慧儀透露希望於 2016 年返回馬來西亞，並與養子和家人一起居住。2014 年 9 月，張慧儀在一電台節目中，表示將全面復出。2017 年，她再度重返 TVB 參演 2018 年重頭劇《宮心計 2 深宮計》；在劇中飾演陸碧雲（陸司製），與知名藝員羅霖（徐司珍）、張文慈（汪司膳）、康華（南宮司設）合作，從而更成為了現實中的好友；拍畢此劇後，她繼續為 TVB 拍攝劇集；2018 年 8 月中與 TVB 結束合約，正式恢復自由身；2019 年底出席馬來西亞「第五屆世界傑出大師頒獎典禮」，更稱會全面復出。
data.name: 張慧儀

data.biography: Park Jin-young (박진영), commonly known as JYP or J.Y. Park, is a South Korean music mogul, singer, and music producer. He is the founder of entertainment company JYP Entertainment.
data.name: Park Jin-young

data.biography:
대한민국의 가수이자 음악 프로듀서, 작곡가, 작사가, 안무가, 기업인, 배우다.

JYP엔터테인먼트의 최대주주로서 현재 JYP엔터테인먼트의 주식 17.72%를 보유하고 있으며, 이는 2019년 7월 주식시장에서 시가 기준으로 1천 3백억 원에 달한다. 박진영은 과거 JYP엔터테인먼트의 대표이사이었지만 현재는 아니다. 그러나 사내 등기이사로서 경영상 법적인 책임을 지는 위치에 있다.

JYP엔터테인먼트의 프로듀서로서 아티스트 및 프로덕션, 영업 업무를 맡는다. 특히 회사 내 신인 아티스트 런칭 때는 최종 결정 권한을 맡는 것으로 보인다.

영문 활동명로는 J.Y. Park 혹은 '진영 박'의 알파벳 이니셜인 JYP라는 이름으로 활동하며, 프로듀서로서는 필명인 J.Y. Park "The Asiansoul"이라는 이름을 쓴다.
data.name: 박진영

data.biography:
朴振荣（J.Y.Park），1972年1月13日出生于韩国首尔，韩国歌手、演员、音乐制作人、经纪公司JYP Entertainment的CEO。

1994年以歌手身份出道，发行多张音乐专辑，并且做为音乐制作人打造出god组合、朴志胤、Rain等明星。

1997成立泰宏经纪公司，后于2001年更名为“JYP Entertainment”，现旗下艺人包括Wonder Girls、2PM、2AM、Miss A、GOT7、TWICE等偶像团体。2011年出演电视剧《Dream High》获第47届百想艺术大奖新人演员奖提名，并于同年主演电影《五百万美元的男人》。
data.name: 朴振荣

data.biography:
樸振榮（J.Y. Park），1972 年 1 月 13 日出生於韓國首爾，韓國歌手、演員、音樂製作人、經紀公司 JYP Entertainment 的 CEO。

1994 年以歌手身份出道，發行多張音樂專輯，並且做為音樂製作人打造出 god 組合、樸志胤、Rain 等明星。

1997 成立泰宏經紀公司，後於 2001 年更名為“JYP Entertainment”，現旗下藝人包括 Wonder Girls、2PM、2AM、Miss A、GOT7、TWICE 等偶像團體。2011 年出演電視劇《Dream High》獲第 47 屆百想藝術大獎新人演員獎提名，並於同年主演電影《五百萬美元的男人》。
data.name: 樸振榮

data.biography: Park Jin-young, más conocido como J.Y. Park (o simplemente JYP) es un cantante, compositor, bailarín, productor discográfico y actual director ejecutivo y fundador de JYP Entertainment, un importante sello discográfico y de gestión de artistas de música pop coreana.
data.name: J.Y. Park

data.biography:
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Hutchings Royal "Hutch" Dano (born May 21, 1992) is an American actor, known for his role as Zeke Falcone in Zeke & Luther. He also played Henry, in Ramona and Beezus. He also played Bailey Pickett's ex-boyfriend, Moose, in The Suite Life on Deck.

Hutch was born in Santa Monica, California. He worked at a skateboard shop and attended Santa Monica High School; he currently resides at Venice Beach, California.[citation needed] Hutch is the son of actor Rick Dano; his paternal grandfather was actor Royal Dano and his maternal great-grandparents were screenwriter/director J. Walter Ruben and actress Virginia Bruce. Hutch booked a commercial at age five, starting his acting career.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Hutch Dano, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Hutch Dano

data.biography:
Hutch  Dano（1992 年 5 月 21 日出生）是一位美国演员，因在 Zeke & Luther 中饰演 Zeke Falcone 而闻名。他还在《雷蒙娜》和《比祖斯》中扮演亨利。他还在《甲板上的套房生活》中扮演贝利·皮克特的前男友穆斯。

哈奇出生于加利福尼亚州圣莫尼卡。他在一家滑板店工作，就读于圣莫尼卡高中;他目前居住在加利福尼亚州的威尼斯海滩。[需要引证]哈奇是演员里克·达诺的儿子;他的祖父是演员皇家达诺，他的外曾祖父母是编剧/导演 J. Walter Ruben 和女演员 Virginia Bruce。哈奇在五岁时预订了一个广告，开始了他的演艺生涯。
data.name: 哈契·达诺

data.biography:
哈契·達諾（1992 年 5 月 21 日出生）是一位美國演員，因在 Zeke & Luther 中飾演 Zeke Falcone 而聞名。他還在《雷蒙娜》和《比祖斯》中扮演亨利。他還在《甲板上的套房生活》中扮演貝利·皮克特的前男友穆斯。

哈奇出生於加利福尼亞州聖莫尼卡。他在一家滑板店工作，就讀於聖莫尼卡高中; 他目前居住在加利福尼亞州的威尼斯海灘。[需要引證]哈奇是演員里克·達諾的兒子; 他的祖父是演員皇家達諾，他的外曾祖父母是編劇/導演 J.Walter Ruben 和女演員 Virginia Bruce。哈奇在五歲時預訂了一個廣告，開始了他的演藝生涯。
data.name: 哈契·達諾

data.biography:
​From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Tyra Ferrell (born March 29, 1962) is an American actress.

Ferrell was born in Houston, Texas. She moved from Houston to New York after high school and began her career on stage including roles on Lena Horne: The Lady and Her Music (1981) and Ain't Misbehavin on Broadway. She made her screen debut in a small role in the 1981 comedy film So Fine, and later appeared in Lady Beware, School Daze, The Mighty Quinn, and The Exorcist III. On television, she guest-starred in Hill Street Blues, The Twilight Zone, and Quantum Leap, and had recurring roles on Square One Television, The Bronx Zoo, and Thirtysomething. In 1990, Ferrell was regular cast member on the short-lived CBS sitcom City starring Valerie Harper.

In 1991, Ferrell played supporting roles in the films Boyz n the Hood and Jungle Fever. In the same year, she was listed as one of twelve "Promising New Actors of 1991" in John A. Willis' Screen World. The following year, she starred alongside Wesley Snipes in the comedy film White Men Can't Jump, and later had supporting roles in Equinox, Poetic Justice and The Perfect Score. Ferrell also played the leading role alongside Mare Winningham in the 1993 Lifetime Television movie Better Off Dead. In 1994, she had the recurring role as Dr. Sarah Langworthy during the first season of the NBC medical drama ER, and from 1996 to 1997 she co-starred alongside Corbin Bernsen on the syndicated science fiction series The Cape.

In 2000, Ferrell co-starred alongside Khandi Alexander in the HBO miniseries The Corner. She later guest-starred on Soul Food, The Shield and Law & Order: Special Victims Unit. In 2004, she was nominated for an NAACP Image Award for Outstanding Actress in a Television Movie, Mini-Series or Dramatic Special for her role in the ABC television film NTSB: The Crash of Flight 323. She returned to acting ten years later with the leading role in Tasha Smith's directorial debut, Boxed In. In 2015, Ferrell was cast in a recurring role on the second season of Fox's prime-time soap opera Empire.
data.name: Tyra Ferrell

data.biography: Tyra Ferrell est une actrice américaine née le 28 janvier 1962 à Houston (Texas). Elle débute sa carrière sur scène, puis enchaîne des petits rôles au cinéma au début des années 1980, notamment dans So Fine (1981), School Daze (1988) et The Mighty Quinn (1989). Elle se révèle véritablement au début des années 1990 avec des rôles marquants dans Boyz n the Hood (1991), où elle incarne Brenda Baker, puis dans Jungle Fever (1991), White Men Can’t Jump (1992) et Poetic Justice (1993).  À la télévision, elle tient des rôles réguliers dans des séries comme The Bronx Zoo (1987-88), City (1990), apparaît dans Thirtysomething et plus tard dans ER (1994) et The Cape (1996-97).  Après une période plus calme dans les années 2000, elle revient sur le devant de la scène avec un rôle dans la saison 2 de Empire (2015). Tyra Ferrell est reconnue pour ses performances nuancées dans des drames sociaux et pour ses personnages forts et réalistes.
data.name: Tyra Ferrell

David Dayan Fisher to angielski aktor z Londynu w Anglii . Znany jest z częstego przedstawiania antagonistycznych postaci, a także z głębokiego głosu.

Grał Michaela Sowerby'ego / Raza w The Bill , pojawił się także w The Last Post , National Treasure , NCIS , Robbery Homicide Division , Burn Notice , Charmed , 24 , Numb3rs i Stargate Atlantis , grając Baden w odcinku „ The Game ”. Był postrzegany jako powracająca postać Trenta Korta w NCIS . Jako aktor głosowy, Fisher zapewnił głos Xaldina, członka Organizacji XIII , w serii gier wideo Kingdom Hearts .

David Dayan Fisher, 6 Haziran 1967 tarihinde Londra, İngiltere'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Rus ve İsrail kökenli bir aileden gelen Fisher, kariyerine İngiliz televizyonunda başladıktan sonra Amerika Birleşik Devletleri'ne taşınarak Hollywood'da kendine özgü bir yer edinmiş bir karakter oyuncusudur.

Kariyerinde genellikle zeki, tehlikeli ve karizmatik karakterleri canlandıran Fisher, en çok tanınan rollerinden birini uzun soluklu CBS dizisi "NCIS"de (2006-2016) canlandırdığı gizemli ve güvenilmez CIA ajanı Trent Kort karakteriyle oynamıştır. Dizi boyunca zaman zaman kahramanlarla iş birliği yapan, zaman zaman ise onlara karşı çalışan bu karmaşık karakter, Fisher'ın izleyiciler tarafından tanınan bir yüz haline gelmesini sağladı. Ayrıca "24", "Charmed", "Burn Notice" ve "Robbery Homicide Division" gibi birçok popüler televizyon dizisinde de akılda kalıcı konuk oyuncu olarak yer almıştır.

Sinema tarafında ise Fisher, genellikle büyük bütçeli aksiyon filmlerinde yardımcı rollerde boy göstermiştir. En bilinen sinema rollerinden biri, "Büyük Hazine" (National Treasure) (2004) filminde Sean Bean'in canlandırdığı kötü karakterin sağ kolu olan Shaw'dur. Ayrıca Christopher Nolan'ın yönettiği "Kara Şövalye Yükseliyor" (The Dark Knight Rises) (2012) filminde de küçük ama dikkat çeken bir role sahiptir.

Fisher'ın kariyerindeki bir diğer önemli alan ise seslendirme sanatçılığıdır. Kendine has tok ve vurgulu sesiyle video oyunu dünyasının en başarılı serilerinden bazılarında önemli karakterlere hayat vermiştir. Özellikle dünya çapında milyonlarca oyuncuya ulaşan "Call of Duty: Modern Warfare" serisindeki Rus sadık asker Çavuş Kamarov karakteri, oyunseverler tarafından en çok bilinen ve sevilen seslendirme performanslarından biridir.

David Dayan Fisher, gerek televizyonda canlandırdığı tekrar eden rollerle, gerekse sinema ve video oyunlarındaki çalışmalarıyla, canlandırdığı karakterlere kattığı yoğunluk ve belirgin ekran varlığı sayesinde Hollywood'da aranan ve saygı duyulan bir karakter oyuncusu ve seslendirme sanatçısı olarak kariyerini sürdürmektedir.

Marcia Carolyn Kaptur (born June 17, 1946) is an American politician serving as the U.S. representative from Ohio's 9th congressional district. Now in her 21st term, she has been a member of Congress since 1983.

A member of the Democratic Party, Kaptur is the longest-serving woman in congressional history (having surpassed Barbara Mikulski in 2023) and the dean of Ohio's congressional delegation.

data.biography: Raoul Trujillo is an American actor, dancer, and choreographer. A former soloist with the Nikolais Dance Theatre, he is the original choreographer and co-director for the American Indian Dance Theatre. He is the host for a series of dancing programs. Trujillo's career spans more than 30 years in film and theatre.  He is perhaps best known for playing Zero Wolf, the Mayan villain in Apocalypto (2006), directed by Mel Gibson, and for playing the Iroquois chief Kiotseaton in the film Black Robe.
data.name: Raoul Max Trujillo

data.biography:
Рауль Максимиано Трухильо де Шовелон — американский актёр, танцор, хореограф и артист.

Происходит из племён апачи и юта. Бывший солист Театра танца Алвина Николаиса, он является содиректором Американского театра индейского танца.Карьера Трухильо в кино и на телевидении длится более чем 30 лет. Первой заметной ролью стала роль вождя ирокезов в историко-приключенческом фильме «Чёрная сутана» (1991). Наибольшую известность актёр приобрёл после выхода в свет фильма Мела Гибсона «Апокалипсис» (2006), где он сыграл роль военачальника майя Пустого Волка.

За свою 30-летнюю карьеру Трухильо сыграл более семидесяти ролей в кино и на телевидении.
data.name: Рауль Трухильо

data.biography:
Michel Peyrelon est un comédien français né le 10 octobre 1936 au Puy-en-Velay (Haute-Loire) et mort le 4 juin 2003 dans le 13e arrondissement de Paris, Hôpital de la Pitié-Salpêtrière. Il a débuté au théâtre chez Jean Vilar en 1959 et au cinéma en 1963 dans Les Vierges. Mais c'est en tournant sous la direction d'Yves Boisset avec des films comme R.A.S. ou Dupont Lajoie, qu'il est remarqué. On le voit alors dans de nombreux rôles secondaires, où il interprète souvent des personnages antipathiques ou inquiétants. Il apparaît entre autres dans Les Valseuses ou Miss Mona pour le cinéma et Commissaire Moulin ou Arsène Lupin pour la télévision. Il fait l'une de ses dernières apparitions à l'écran dans Les Visiteurs. Il meurt à l'hôpital de la Pitié-Salpêtrière (Paris 13e) le 4 juin 2003 à l'âge de 66 ans. Il fait don de son corps à la science et ses cendres sont inhumées dans la fosse commune du cimetière parisien de Thiais, dédiée à tous ceux qui ont donné leur corps à la science, auprès de Bernard Blier.

Source: Article "Michel Peyrelon" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

data.name: Tiên Kiếm Kì Hiệp 3
data.overview: Phim Tiên Kiếm Kì Hiệp 3 bắt đầu vào 50 năm trước của Tiên Kiếm 1. Phim xoay quanh Thần Tướng Chấn Yêu tên là Phi Bồng trên thần giới. Vào 1000 năm trước, vì để ma tôn Trọng Lầu xâm phạm Tiên Giới cho nên Thần Giới phái binh tới bắt Phi Bồng, Phi Bồng bị rớt xuống nhân gian, biến thành Thục Sơn Trấn Yêu Kiếm, rồi trải qua nhiều kiếp luân hồi. Người quản lý Thần Thụ (cây thần) là Tịch Dao vốn yêu thầm Phi Bồng, sau khi Phi Bồng xuống nhân gian, nàng liền dùng quả của Thần Thụ chế thành nữ tử là Tuyết Kiến xuống nhân gian. Sau nhiều kiếp luân hồi, Phi Bồng  trở thành Cảnh Thiên, một chàng trai làm chức quản lý đồ cổ ở Vĩnh An, thành Du Châu. Anh có tài nhận biết đồ cổ, rất mê tiền, tham vọng trở thành người giàu nhất thiên hạ hoặc là Thục Sơn kiếm tiên. Sau khi Cảnh Thiên tìm được Ma Kiếm thì quen biết Tuyết Kiến, từ đó cuộc sống của Cảnh Thiên cũng đổi thay.
